General.Name: Entergy Mississippi LLC
General.Description: Entergy Mississippi, Inc. generates, transmits, and distributes electric power primarily to retail customers in Mississippi. The company generates electricity from coal and gas/oil sources. As of March 06, 2018, it served approximately 447,000 customers in 45 counties. The company was founded in 1927 and is based in Jackson, Mississippi. Entergy Mississippi, Inc. is a subsidiary of Entergy Corporation.
